headline: CorTrust Bank Selects Jack Henry to Provide for Local Communities with Competitive, Flexible Offerings
summary: Jack Henry® (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that CorTrust Bank has selected Jack Henry to implement a flexible, open platform that will drive operational efficiency and support long-term growth. By improving efficiency and increasing assets per employee, the bank is positioned to reinvest in its local communities and be the financial provider of choice across every stage of customers' personal and business journeys.
